title: Two-phase loop duplicates name/description skip predicate
description: The condition `if path == "name" || path == "description" { continue; }` appears identically in both the Phase 1 validation loop and the Phase 2 write loop. If a new simple property (e.g. "tags") is added later, one site will get updated and the other forgotten. Suggested rewrite: extract `fn is_simple_prop(p: &str) -> bool { matches!(p, "name" | "description") }` and call it in both loops. Three lines, zero new abstraction overhead, avoids silent divergence.
